sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Merck stock steadies as Keytruda drives Q1 2026 revenue growth
feed.summary: Merck & Co.'s stock is primarily driven by its oncology blockbuster Keytruda, which continues to propel revenue growth in Q1 2026. The company is investing billions in R&D to expand its pipeline beyond Keytruda, while also maintaining a significant cash return program. Keytruda remains a top-selling cancer medicine globally, and its performance, alongside pipeline developments and capital allocation, influences Merck's market valuation.

feed.title: Intel Raises 2026 CapEx Outlook as AI Demand Lifts Forecast
feed.summary: Intel has increased its 2026 capital expenditure projection to over $20 billion, driven by strong AI infrastructure demand and better-than-expected second-quarter results. The semiconductor company also provided updates on its manufacturing roadmap, including plans for risk production of its 14A process by late 2027, with high-volume production slated for 2028. Investors are now focused on Intel's ability to tackle supply bottlenecks and convert AI demand into sustained revenue growth.

feed.title: Beyond PSPS: PG&E’s Wildfire Journey
feed.summary: This episode details how Pacific Gas & Electric (PG&E) is transforming its wildfire mitigation strategy, leveraging advanced technologies like AI and predictive analytics. T&D World's Jeff Postelwait interviews Andy Abranches, PG&E's vice president of wildfire mitigation, to discuss efforts to reduce Public Safety Power Shutoffs (PSPS), enhance grid monitoring, and build a more resilient electric grid. The conversation highlights the adoption of AI-enabled monitoring, expanded weather intelligence, undergrounding initiatives, and refined power line safety settings to improve safety and minimize customer disruption.

feed.title: OAKCHA EXPANDS INTO ULTA BEAUTY NATIONWIDE
feed.summary: OAKCHA, a fragrance house focused on accessible luxury-quality fragrances, has announced its launch at Ulta Beauty. Starting August 2, 2026, OAKCHA products will be available on Ulta.com and in over 100 Ulta Beauty stores, with plans to expand to more than 700 stores nationwide. This partnership marks OAKCHA's first exclusive launch with a national beauty retailer, aiming to bring its collection-building approach to

feed.title: CMS Energy stock trades steady as regulated utility earnings and dividend underpin valuation
feed.summary: CMS Energy stock, primarily operating as Consumers Energy in Michigan, maintains a steady valuation due to its regulated utility earnings and consistent dividend growth. The company's financials are driven by approved rate increases, strategic capital investments in grid modernization and clean energy, and a commitment to cost control. Investors value CMS Energy for its predictable cash flows, income-oriented dividend policy, and long-term investment plans aligned with regulatory frameworks and clean energy transitions.

feed.title: Third Business Unit of Tier-1 Israeli-Based Global Defense Company Places DefendAir Net Pod Order with ParaZero
feed.summary: ParaZero Technologies Ltd. announced a new order for its DefendAir Net Pod system from a third business unit within a Tier-1 Israeli-based global defense company. This order includes DefendAir Net Pods and dedicated integration support for the customer's autonomous Counter-UAS system. This marks the third business unit within the company to adopt ParaZero's DefendAir technology, emphasizing the growing recognition for layered defenses against hostile drones.

feed.title: Merck signs licensing deals for new HIV pill (MRK:NYSE)
feed.summary: Merck has announced seven licensing agreements with generic drug manufacturers, including Viatris, to expand access to its investigational HIV pill, alimatravir. These agreements are aimed at making the drug available in low- and middle-income countries. Three of the companies involved are from sub-Saharan Africa, notably Aspen Pharmacare Holdings.

feed.title: Walmart says goodbye to traditional shopping carts as it remodels 650 stores nationwide
feed.summary: Walmart is implementing new rules for the use of fulfillment carts in its stores, primarily for online order preparation, by reducing the maximum load to six containers and specifying when employees should push versus pull carts. This change comes amidst a significant e-commerce boom for the company and is part of a larger initiative that includes remodeling over 650 Supercenters and Neighborhood Markets across the U.S. in 2026. The remodeling aims to modernize the shopping experience with new layouts, updated technology, and personalized checkout assistance.

feed.title: ParaZero's Non-Explosive Net System Ordered for Drone Defense
feed.summary: ParaZero Technologies (Nasdaq: PRZO) received a new order for its DefendAir Net Pod system from a third business unit of a Tier-1 Israeli-based global defense company. This order, which includes engineering support for integration into an autonomous Counter-UAS system, expands ParaZero's engagement within the organization. The DefendAir Net Pod provides a non-explosive, net-based interception layer against hostile drones, emphasizing controlled neutralization and reduced collateral risk for various defense platforms.

feed.title: Home Depot stock trades near yearly highs as housing and Pro demand support earnings
feed.summary: Home Depot stock is trading near yearly highs, supported by resilient US home improvement demand, stable revenue, solid margins, and strong demand from professional customers and ongoing housing activity. The company's growth is driven by its interconnected retail strategy, disciplined capital allocation, and a diversified product mix that leverages both DIY and Pro customer segments. Investments in supply chain efficiency and technology further reinforce its competitive position and long-term value creation.

feed.title: DuPont stock trades steady as specialty materials earnings and guidance frame valuation
feed.summary: DuPont's stock is supported by its specialty materials portfolio, with recent earnings for fiscal 2025 showing net sales of around $8.4 billion and adjusted EPS above $3. The company's focus on Electronics & Industrial, Water & Protection, and other specialty lines, along with cost efficiencies, contributes to steady operating margins. While some segments showed growth, others experienced declines, and future guidance indicates a cautious but stable outlook for net sales and EPS, supported by ongoing efficiency programs and capital allocation strategies.

feed.title: Dollar Tree stock steadies as margin focus follows latest quarterly results
feed.summary: Dollar Tree Inc. (DLTR) saw its stock steady after its latest quarterly results, with investors weighing revenue growth against margin pressures from restructuring and pricing changes. Despite a 4% year-on-year sales increase in Q1 2026, operating income and net income declined due to higher distribution, labor, and shrink expenses. The company is accelerating store closures for underperforming Family Dollar locations and refining its product mix to improve profitability and long-term earnings potential.

feed.title: North America Agriculture Gateway Market Size, Forecast – 2035
feed.summary: The North America agriculture gateway market was valued at USD 1.07 billion in 2025 and is projected to reach USD 2.03 billion by 2035, growing at a CAGR of 6.4

feed.title: Wells Fargo Adjusts Price Target on Thermo Fisher Scientific to $660 From $615, Maintains Overweight Rating
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has increased its price target for Thermo Fisher Scientific (TMO) to $660 from $615, while maintaining an "Overweight" rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects continued confidence from the bank in the scientific instrument and service company's performance. The article also lists several other analyst price target adjustments for Thermo Fisher Scientific on the same day.

feed.title: GE Aerospace Collaboration Completes First Hybrid-Electric Flight Above 30,000 Feet
feed.summary: GE Aerospace recently concluded the 2026 Farnborough International Airshow with significant commitments, including approximately 1,800 engine orders and a record-breaking MoU with IndiGo for over 1,000 LEAP-1A engines. The company also announced key advancements like the first hybrid-electric flight above 30,000 feet, GEnx-1B engine selections, and certifications for LEAP-1B durability upgrades. These achievements underscore GE Aerospace's focus on future flight technologies and current customer delivery.

feed.title: Church & Dwight stock trades near its yearly high as earnings and household brands support valuation
feed.summary: Church & Dwight (CHD) stock is trading near its yearly high, driven by consistent earnings growth and a strong portfolio of household brands like Arm & Hammer. The company reported mid-single-digit billion-dollar annual net sales for fiscal 2025, with adjusted earnings per share increasing by a mid-teens percentage. This performance, along with a moderate payout ratio and ongoing share repurchase program, underpins investor confidence despite a competitive market.

feed.title: Lamb Weston Holdings Announces Quarterly Dividend, Payable on September 4, 2026
feed.summary: Lamb Weston Holdings, Inc. has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.38 per share of common stock. The dividend is set to be paid on September 4, 2026, to shareholders who are on record as of August 7, 2026. This announcement provides

feed.title: Tesla Short Sellers Gain $9 Billion as Shares Tumble
feed.summary: Tesla Inc. saw its shares drop significantly after reporting weaker-than-expected second-quarter earnings, leading to substantial gains for short sellers. Short sellers pocketed approximately $4.3 billion in mark-to-market gains from the one-day selloff, bringing their year-to-date unrealized gains to around $9.08 billion for 2026. Despite the current struggles and high valuation, investors are looking to future updates on robotaxis, robotics, and AI to restore confidence in the company's growth prospects.

feed.title: Truist Financial Forecasts Strong Price Appreciation for Global Payments (NYSE:GPN) Stock
feed.summary: Truist Financial recently raised its price target for Global Payments (NYSE:GPN) from $76 to $79, while maintaining a hold rating on the stock. Despite this, the broader analyst sentiment remains cautious, with a consensus "Hold" rating and an average target price of $83.46, as other firms have trimmed their price objectives. Global Payments exceeded earnings expectations, reporting $2.96 per share and $2.86 billion in revenue, and provided FY2026 EPS guidance between $13.80 and $14.00.

feed.title: CSX (CSX) Stock Faces Questions As Q2 EPS Growth Lags Bullish Narratives
feed.summary: CSX (CSX) recently reported Q2 2026 revenue of US$3,935 million and EPS of US$0.54, with trailing 12-month revenue of US$14.5 billion and EPS of US$1.73. While net profit margins remain in the low 20s, current earnings growth of 3.9% trails the 8.9% forecast, creating a gap between recent performance and market expectations. The stock trades at a P/E of 30.4x, above its DCF fair value of US$46.57, suggesting that some of the anticipated growth may already be priced in, leading to mixed views for investors.

feed.title: Intuitive Surgical Stock Is On Sale, But Is The Growth Story Changing?
feed.summary: Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) stock has dropped 23% from its recent high due to a slowdown in U.S. robotic procedure growth, despite strong demand for its new da Vinci 5 systems and robust international growth. This presents a critical juncture for investors, prompting questions about whether the dip is a temporary blip for a dominant company or a sign of market maturation. While the company exhibits strong financial health and a history of recovering from pullbacks, its premium valuation is being challenged by the decelerated U.S. growth.

feed.title: NEST expands data capabilities through Northern Trust partnership
feed.summary: NEST is partnering with Northern Trust to enhance its data and technology capabilities as it approaches £100bn in assets under management. This strategic 15-year partnership allows NEST's small investment operations team to automate processes, focus on higher-value activities, and leverage Northern Trust's expertise instead of building these capabilities in-house. The collaboration also prepares NEST for future challenges, including developing a retirement income solution for its members.

feed.title: L3Harris Technologies Inc (NYSE:LHX) Announces Quarterly Dividend of $1.25
feed.summary: L3Harris Technologies Inc (NYSE:LHX) has declared a quarterly dividend of $1.25 per share, payable on September 18th to shareholders of record as of September 4th. This dividend represents an annualized payout of $5.00 per share and a yield of approximately 1.7%. The company boasts a strong dividend history, having increased its payout for 24 consecutive years, and its 41.1% payout

feed.title: PIFI ETF Profile: Dividends, Returns (BOATS:PIFI)
feed.summary: This article provides a detailed profile of the PIFI ETF, focusing on its dividends, returns, and fundamental details. It covers key statistics like assets under management, expense ratio, inception date, and investment strategy, highlighting its focus on US corporate and government debt. The article also addresses frequently asked questions about the fund's holdings, dividend history, and issuer.

feed.title: Fortive stock trades steadily as investors weigh margin expansion and recurring revenue growth
feed.summary: Fortive stock is trading steadily as investors assess the company's focus on recurring revenue growth and expanding adjusted operating margins. The article highlights Fortive's strategic portfolio management, including acquisitions and divestitures, to concentrate on high-growth, high-margin segments, particularly within industrial technology and healthcare. The company's diversified platforms and disciplined capital deployment are key to its financial targets and long-term investment case.

feed.title: Comcast Declares Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: Comcast Corporation announced its Board of Directors declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.33 per share on the company’s common stock. This dividend is payable on October 28, 2026, to shareholders of record as of October 7, 2026. Comcast, a global media and technology company, provides various connectivity, entertainment, and experience services worldwide through its brands.

feed.title: CBS To Switch Affiliation From Nexstar To Hearst TV & Forum Communications Stations In A Half Dozen Markets
feed.summary: CBS will switch the affiliation of its stations in six markets from Nexstar to Hearst and Forum Communications, effective August 1. While CBS extended affiliations in 36 Nexstar markets, the six affected markets will see changes like Fox programming upgrades or The CW moving to main channels. Nexstar plans to expand local news content in some of these markets following the transitions.

feed.title: Valero Energy stock trades steady as refining margins and cash returns stay in focus
feed.summary: Valero Energy's stock performance is closely linked to refining economics, including margins, utilization, and capital allocation strategies. The company, a major independent refiner, generates shareholder returns through dividends, share repurchases, and efficient operations. Investors monitor crack spreads, quarterly earnings, and Valero's investments in both traditional and renewable fuels amidst evolving regulatory and market conditions.

feed.title: T-Mobile US, Inc. SEC Filing (Jul 23, 2026)
feed.summary: T-Mobile US, Inc. filed an IRANNOTICE with the SEC on July 23, 2026, pursuant to the Iran Threat Reduction and Syria Human Rights Act of 2012. This notice was included in its Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q for the quarter ended June 30, 2026. The filing indicates a neutral impact and sentiment according to AI-generated analysis.

feed.title: These Analysts Slash Their Forecasts On Deckers Outdoor Following Q1 Results
feed.summary: Deckers Outdoor Corp (NYSE: DECK) reported strong first-quarter financial results, exceeding analyst expectations for both earnings per share and revenue. Despite the positive performance, two analysts, Jonathan Komp from Baird and Tom Nikic from Needham, maintained their ratings but lowered their price targets for DECK stock. The company's shares fell 2.4% in pre-market trading following the announcement.

feed.title: Polestar 2 by Polestar - subtle facelift and software focus
feed.summary: The Polestar 2 receives a subtle but significant update, focusing on software enhancements and minor design changes rather than radical overhauls. Key improvements include updated battery options, a software-first strategy with Android Automotive OS, and a refreshed "SmartZone" front panel. This strategy underlines Polestar's differentiation from traditional carmakers and positions the Polestar 2 as a stable revenue driver for the company.

feed.title: AMD Stock Gains Overnight: Analysts Laud Chipmaker's ‘Server Leadership’ After Strong Helios, Customer Updates
feed.summary: AMD stock gained overnight after its Advancing AI conference, where CEO Lisa Su projected the total computing market will expand to $2 trillion by 2030, with AI accelerators accounting for $1.4 trillion. Analysts like Jefferies raised price targets, citing AMD's server market leadership and strong product announcements, including the Helios rack-scale AI system. Retail sentiment on Stocktwits also shifted to "bullish" following the news.

feed.title: Boston Properties stock gains as results and valuation matter
feed.summary: Boston Properties (BXP) stock is driven by its latest earnings report, focusing on funds from operations, occupancy, and leverage, rather than broad market sentiment. As a U.S. office REIT, its performance is closely watched for insights into demand, rent collection, and cash generation within the office market. Investors track metrics like share price, quarterly funds from operations, and leasing trends, with the next earnings update being a crucial reference point for its valuation.

feed.title: Corteva declares $0.18 quarterly dividend per share
feed.summary: Corteva Inc. (NYSE:CTVA) announced a quarterly common stock dividend of $0.18 per share, payable on September 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of September 1, 2026. Additionally, the Board of Directors of EIDP Inc., a Corteva subsidiary, declared preferred stock dividends of $1.125 and $0.875 per share for its $4.50 and $3.50 series preferred stock, respectively, payable on October 23, 2026. Corteva is an agriculture company specializing in seed, crop protection, and digital products.

feed.title: KLA Corporation remains a Buy amid strong AI-driven semiconductor demand and solid margins.
feed.summary: KLA Corporation is maintained as a Buy due to sustained demand in the semiconductor sector driven by AI capital expenditure. The company's strong gross margins of approximately 61.75% and mid-teens revenue growth through 2027 support its medium-term valuation. Investors should focus on bookings, fab readiness, and China exposure, as market attention shifts to forward-looking guidance.

feed.title: Align Technology stock trades lower after softer Q1 2026 revenue and cautious outlook
feed.summary: Align Technology's stock fell after reporting softer-than-expected Q1 2026 revenue of $1.0 billion and a 17% decline in diluted earnings per share to $1.50, missing analyst consensus. The company issued a cautious full-year 2026 outlook, projecting mid-single-digit revenue growth and continued margin pressure, despite ongoing investment in its digital ecosystem and international expansion. Investors are concerned about macroeconomic headwinds, cautious consumer spending, and increased competition impacting demand for clear aligners and intraoral scanners.

feed.title: HPE Appoints Former Booking Holdings CFO David Goulden to Board of Directors
feed.summary: Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) has announced the appointment of David Goulden, former CFO of Booking Holdings Inc., to its board of directors. Goulden brings over 35 years of leadership experience in technology and finance, including senior roles at EMC Corporation and Dell Technologies. His expertise in corporate finance, M&A, and enterprise technology is expected to support HPE's strategic expansion in AI, cloud, and networking.

feed.title: LAMB WESTON HOLDINGS ($LW) Releases Q4 2026 Earnings
feed.summary: Lamb Weston Holdings ($LW) reported stronger-than-expected Q4 2026 earnings and revenue, beating analyst estimates. The company reported EPS of $0.87 against an estimate of $0.64 and revenue of $1.77 billion, exceeding the $1.74 billion estimate. The article also details recent insider trading activity, with multiple purchases, and institutional investor movements, showing both additions and reductions in holdings.

feed.title: Ridgetech Strengthens Pharmaceutical Ecosystem Leadership with Vice-President Role in Zhejiang Biomedical Association
feed.summary: Ridgetech's wholly-owned subsidiary, Zhejiang Jiuxin Medicine, has been elected as a vice-president unit of the Hangzhou Qiantang District Biomedical and Cosmetic High-Quality Development Association. This recognition stems from Jiuxin Medicine's work in implementing full-variety drug traceability code scanning across Zhejiang Province and its use of AI and big-data analytics to enhance pharmaceutical supply chain transparency. The appointment highlights Ridgetech's dual-engine strategy, combining offline B2B distribution with an online platform, to integrate its pharmaceutical and healthcare ecosystem and lead in national drug traceability reform.

feed.title: Citigroup Boosts United Rentals (NYSE:URI) Price Target to $1,330.00
feed.summary: Citigroup has raised its price target for United Rentals (NYSE:URI) to $1,330 from $1,270, maintaining a "buy" rating and suggesting a 16.4% upside. This follows strong Q2 results where United Rentals exceeded EPS and revenue estimates, reporting $12.76 EPS and $4.41 billion in revenue. Analyst sentiment remains largely positive, with a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating and an average price target of $1,168.12.

feed.title: Rothschild & Co Redburn Raises Price Target on Thermo Fisher Scientific to $625 From $610, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Rothschild & Co Redburn has increased its price target for Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc. (TMO) to $625 from $610, while reaffirming a Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a continued positive outlook from the analyst firm on the scientific instrument and services company. Other financial institutions like RBC, Barclays, Bernstein, Goldman Sachs, and TD Cowen have also recently updated their price targets and ratings for Thermo Fisher Scientific.

feed.title: 3M Co (NYSE: MMM) EVP exercises options, then sells 7,880 shares
feed.summary: John Patrick Banovetz, Executive Vice President at 3M Company (NYSE: MMM), exercised non-qualified stock options for 7,880 shares at $154.69 per share, then immediately sold all 7,880 shares at $170.44 per share. This transaction resulted in an approximate pre-tax spread of $124,000, with gross sale proceeds around $1.34 million. The options exercised had an expiration date of February 6, 2027, and the filing indicated the transaction was not made under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan.

feed.title: Piper Sandler Cuts Roper Technologies (NASDAQ:ROP) Price Target to $526.00
feed.summary: Piper Sandler has lowered its price target for Roper Technologies (NASDAQ:ROP) to $526.00 from $540.00 while maintaining an "overweight" rating. This adjustment follows Roper Technologies' beat-and-raise second-quarter earnings, where the company surpassed EPS and revenue estimates and raised its full-year 2026 guidance, driven by strength in application software and AI-related demand. Despite the reduced price target from Piper Sandler, other analysts have offered varied ratings and price objectives for ROP.

feed.title: Citigroup Adjusts Price Target on Evergy to $97 From $95, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Citigroup has increased its price target for Evergy (EVRG) shares from $95 to $97, while maintaining its "Buy" rating on the utility company. This adjustment reflects a positive outlook on Evergy's financial prospects. The article also lists other recent analyst adjustments for Evergy from firms like BTIG, BMO Capital, Barclays, and Jefferies, indicating active analyst coverage for the stock.

feed.title: Evercore ISI Trims Price Target on Hartford Insurance to $145 From $146, Maintains In Line Rating
feed.summary: Evercore ISI has adjusted its price target for Hartford Insurance (HIG) to $145, down from $146, while maintaining an "In Line" rating. The update comes alongside news of Hartford's higher quarterly profit driven by strong insurance demand and investment income, as well as several recent analyst rating changes and dividend declarations. The company also announced a significant equity buyback plan and a new board appointment.

feed.title: DaVita stock trades steadily as recent quarterly earnings highlight stable dialysis demand
feed.summary: DaVita Inc. (NYSE: DVA) continues to demonstrate steady performance, supported by robust dialysis demand, strong financial metrics, and strategic share repurchases. The company's recent quarterly earnings show stable revenue growth in its kidney care business and improved earnings per share, driven by effective margin management. DaVita's defensive market position and consistent cash flow generation make it an attractive holding for investors in the US healthcare services sector.

feed.title: BiomX's Zorronet expands in Europe with AI coll...
feed.summary: BiomX's subsidiary Zorronet is expanding its AI-powered monitoring technology into Central and Eastern Europe through a partnership with Czech company Samura s.r.o. The collaboration will focus on smart pest management in agriculture and protecting critical transportation infrastructure using AI for early detection. This expansion aims to enhance safety, reduce costs, and improve operational efficiency in new commercial markets, with support from Samura for sales and Digital4Pest for technical assistance in the Czech and Slovakian markets.

feed.title: Form 4 Vertex Pharmaceuticals Inc For: 24 July By Investing.com
feed.summary: This article announces the filing of Form 4 by Vertex Pharmaceuticals Inc. on July 24. Form 4 is a document filed with the SEC by company insiders to report changes in their ownership of the company's stock. The article is brief and primarily serves as a notification of this event.

feed.title: Corteva declares $0.18 quarterly dividend per share By Investing.com
feed.summary: Corteva Inc. announced a quarterly common stock dividend of $0.18 per share, payable on September 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of September 1, 2026. Additionally, its subsidiary, EIDP Inc., declared preferred stock dividends of $1.125 per share for the $4.50 series and $0.875 per share for the $3.50 series, payable on October 23, 2026. Corteva is an agriculture company focusing on seed, crop protection, and digital products.

feed.title: ETF Showdown: XBI vs PBE, Which Biotech Fund Wins?
feed.summary: This article compares two biotech ETFs, XBI and PBE, highlighting their differing investment strategies and performance. XBI, with its equal-weight spread across many biotech names, has shown stronger returns in recent bullish markets due to its higher beta. PBE, which screens for fundamentals and focuses on larger, profitable companies, offers more stability in volatile markets. Investors' choice depends on their risk tolerance and market outlook.
